/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -flto -shared  -o MCTS.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/mcts_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/mcts_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/mcts_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/mcts_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MCTS.dir/src/mcts_data_handler.cpp.o
